title: Rustic French Brown Rice Noodle Pot Au Feu
description: A hearty, earthy French dish from the Alsace region, featuring brown rice noodles and render fat, perfect for a romantic dinner, this recipe is onion and garlic free.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
Slice the carrots and celery into large chunks.
In a large pot, heat the render fat over medium heat.
Add the sliced carrots and celery and cook until they are tender.
Add the mushrooms and leeks and cook until they are softened.
Add the red wine, beef broth, thyme, and bay leaves to the pot.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer.
Cook the brown rice noodles according to the package instructions.
To serve, place a portion of the noodle mixture onto a cedar plank, then spoon the pot au feu mixture over the top.
